nasb.text: But now Christ has been raised from the dead, the first fruits of those who are asleep.

esv.text: But in fact Christ has been raised from the dead, the firstfruits of those who have fallen asleep.

cnv.text: 現在基督已經從死人中復活，成為睡了的人初熟的果子。

ccb.text: 然而，基督已经从死里复活，祂是死人中第一个复活的。

csbs.text: 但如今，基督已经从死人中复活，成为睡了之人初熟的果子，
